case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $284.97 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL $284.97 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $324.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ JUAN MANUEL
